_meta.title: The 100x Gauntlet: Definitive Ruleset v7.7.3
_meta.description: The fully pruned, mathematically validated deployment ruleset. All negative EV/tc bleeders and unstable OOS instruments have been quarantined. Relies on dynamic environment filters (ef) and hit functions (hf).

TIER_1A_CORE_FOUNDATION.description: Cheap $48 tickets. High frequency, stable EV/tc (+43 to +72). The bedrock of the bankroll.

TIER_1B_MID_FIELD_STRIKERS.description: Higher cost ($144-$360), but massive EV generators. Requires strict gating.

instruments.gates: R6, SumOdds 6.0-8.5, Purse 8k-25k, Not 1st Race, No Chalk

instruments.note: Gate tightened v7.7.3 to protect against low-odds bleed.

TIER_2_HIGH_YIELD_ANCHORS.description: The undisputed champions of EV/tc, led by TRI145.

instruments.gates: R6, SumOdds 6.0-8.5, Purse 8k-35k, Sprints Only, No Chalk

instruments.note: SumOdds max tightened to 8.5 in v7.7.3.

TIER_3_SITUATIONAL_SUPPORT.description: Lower EV/tc, but mathematically sound. Heavily pruned in v7.7.3 to remove expensive bleeders.

instruments.gates: R6, Races 4-8, Fav2Odds >= 4.0, Not 1st Race, No Chalk
R6, Fav2Odds >= 4.0, Not 1st Race, No Chalk
R7, SumOdds 6.0-8.0, Purse 8k-15k, Sprints Only, Not 1st Race, No Chalk
R7, SumOdds >= 6.0, Fav2Odds >= 4.0, Purse 8k-20k, Sprints Only, No Chalk

QUARANTINED_V7_7_3.description: Instruments removed from active deployment due to negative EV, extreme ticket cost, or OOS failure.

instruments.reason: Demoted v7.7.3. $960 ticket cost with only +8.2 EV/tc. Failed OOS 2025/2026.
Demoted v7.7.3. $1680 ticket cost. EV/tc dropped to negative (-4.9) in latest audit.
Demoted v7.7.3. $1680 ticket cost. EV/tc too low to justify drawdown risk.
Confirmed negative EV/tc (-0.183) across all windows.
Confirmed negative EV/tc (-0.213) across all windows.
